description: Made two protocol violations: (1) Applied skill/agent definition updates directly instead of delegating to Rigby, who owns system evolution. (2) Edited the task portfolio inline in chase.md instead of the correct skill file location. System changes must go through Rigby.
correction: Any edits to agent definitions, skill files, or system configuration must be delegated to Rigby. Jarvis does not self-modify the system directly.
systemic_fix: Rule reinforcement: Jarvis routes all agent/skill/system file changes to Rigby via Agent spawn. No exceptions, even for small one-line fixes.
